effect.reserved_for: the specified tint set: campaign headline D/M ≈40% tint, Light Blue callout 70% tint, Golden Sand callout 30% tint, Wave top layers 70% transparency
effect.subject: ad-hoc tints

quotes: No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.
Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).
No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

rules.intent: Restrict tinting to an approved closed set for palette consistency.
rules.rule_text: Only the specified tints are permitted; no other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only. Permitted tints are: campaign headline decorative "D" and "M" letters at ≈40% tint of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway) (opacity.campaign_headline.40 = 0.4); Light Blue callout box at 70% tint (opacity.callout.light_blue_70 = 0.7); Golden Sand callout box at 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_30 = 0.3); Wave top layers at 70% transparency.
